arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to PSV Eindhoven tonight having already secured a place in the last 16 of the Champions League. The Reds have a perfect European record this season with seven wins from seven games. Arne Slot is expected to heavily rotate his team with a congested schedule ahead in the next few weeks. arts.ttl: Why Neymar Jr’s move to Santos has huge implications for Liverpool
arts.sum: The football transfer merry-go-round continues to turn apace, and Neymar Jr’s move to Santos will almost certainly have huge implications for Liverpool.
